title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Wabash National India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Wabash National India
jsonLd.description:
Wabash National India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
